case_title: LEASECOM CORPORATION VS. MARY CROGHAN et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEASECOM CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CROGHAN, MARY MAIGRET, OWEN JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
